title: Secrets, Dependencies, Static Analysis, and Supply Chain · Policy Clinic: Secret Scanning
summary: Build layered security gates for source, dependencies, workflows, and releases. Planned artifact: Add and verify the gates secret scanning increment in a secure-development gate stack. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Prevent, detect, revoke, and remediate committed credentials and sensitive files.
Pair coverage gaps with mutation, defect, and risk evidence.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# Risk-profiled repository gate portfolio
# Each gate needs purpose, command, failure fixture, owner, and suppression policy.

steps.title: Predict Secret Scanning
steps.instruction:
Use a changed theory case derived from this module: gates security. Preserve inputs, constraints, an observable trace, and a boundary result.

content.text: Prevent, detect, revoke, and remediate committed credentials and sensitive files. Use this as an observable contract: name its preconditions, trace the state or value change, and state what evidence would disprove the result.

content.text: Check preconditions, perform the operation in an inspectable order, then verify the result and a boundary case.

content.title: Worked case pattern

options.text: The record names the assumption, applies Secret Scanning, and reports a changed-case check tied to the stakeholder decision.

options.text: Keep the artifact unchanged and rewrite the explanation so the current output appears intentional.

steps.title: Build Secret Scanning evidence
steps.instruction: Append a gates-secret-scanning-khc52i: manifest entry with concrete verify plus failure, owner, or repair evidence.
steps.why: Building a runnable or mechanically reviewable artifact turns Secret Scanning into observable performance evidence.

content.code:
gates-secret-scanning-khc52i:
  verify: [replace with a deterministic check]
  failure: [replace with the rejected condition]
  repair: [replace with a local reproduction and correction path]
content.caption: Shape of the required increment; replace generic language with the current stakeholder case.

content.title: Evidence is more than syntax
content.text: The structural check is only one gate. The following changed-case decision and explanation must also hold.

steps.title: Defend the Secret Scanning model
steps.instruction: Write a concise evidence note that explains when Secret Scanning applies, what can fail, and how the changed case was verified.
steps.why: Retrieval and explanation expose gaps that recognition questions can hide.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Prevent, detect, revoke, and remediate committed credentials and sensitive files.
